rules.description: Implementation team must not Read/Grep/Glob anything under original/, specs-raw/, transcripts/observation/, reports/audit/.
rules.rationale: Legal firewall: Implementation may never see the original source or the raw observation transcripts.

rules.description: Implementation team must not run Bash commands that target original/, specs-raw/, transcripts/observation/.
rules.rationale: Defense-in-depth: even shell commands cannot reach forbidden paths.

rules.description: Implementation may not invoke redis-cli (which would let them probe the original).
rules.rationale: Implementation must work from frozen specs and tests, never live probing.
Quarantine reasoning traces; verification works from spec + code + parity oracle.

rules.description: Observation must not see implementation source.
rules.rationale: Prevents observation from biasing future spec extractions toward what the impl already does.

rules.description: Only the coordinator subagent may use the Task tool.
rules.rationale: Centralized delegation = a single chokepoint for the prose-level firewall.
